name: Pyaar Yaa Paap
overview: Death wears many faces when born of love and betrayal. In this anthology, each standalone story—from grandiose relationships to hidden affairs—unfolds in murder mystery style, probing the blurred lines between affection and obsession. It’s a thriller collection that entertains, shocks, and prompts deep reflection.

trailers.title: Pyaar Yaa Paap Official Trailer Watch Now | Sandeepa Dhar Anveshi Jain Kabir Sadanand Kavita Kaushik
